_comment: ADAPT-3614 — Add the 'dbOptions' block below to your conf/config.json to configure the MongoDB connection pool.
_notes: TLS/SSL for DocumentDB does NOT go here — it is already embedded in your dbConnectionUri (?tls=true&tlsCAFile=...).
These settings control connection pool sizing and timeout behaviour.
maxPoolSize × number_of_active_tenants = total connections held against DocumentDB.
Tune maxPoolSize against your DocumentDB instance tier (e.g. db.r5.large supports ~250 connections).
retryWrites=false must remain in your dbConnectionUri — DocumentDB does not support retryable writes.
